sector_rotation.explanation: Cyclicals are outperforming defensives, suggesting investors are comfortable with risk. Typically seen in early/mid expansion phases.

news_headlines.title: Live: Best Buy CEO to leave as company seeks path to steady growth - Star Tribune
news_headlines.description: Corie Barry will step down; company lifer Jason Bonfig will take the helm in November.

news_headlines.title: Anthropic’s most dangerous AI model just fell into the wrong hands - The Verge
news_headlines.description: Anthropic’s powerful Mythos cybersecurity AI model has been accessed by a “small group of unauthorised users.”

news_headlines.title: How the airline industry could be impacted if Spirit Airlines is liquidated - NPR
news_headlines.description: Spirit has not confirmed a liquidation, though it has filed for bankruptcy protection twice. Experts predict rising fuel costs could push the company to close its doors for good.

news_headlines.title: Fed chair pick Warsh makes case for smaller Fed holdings in hearing - KSL News
news_headlines.description: Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump's Federal Reserve chair nominee, told a Senate panel on Tuesday he would work with the Treasury Department to create a smaller Fed balance sheet.

news_headlines.title: Stock futures rise after Trump extends ceasefire with Iran: Live updates - CNBC
news_headlines.description: President Donald Trump extended the U.S. ceasefire with Iran on Tuesday afternoon.

news_headlines.title: UK inflation jumps to 3.3% in March as fuel prices surge amid Iran war - CNBC
news_headlines.description: Fuel prices saw their largest increase for over three years, the ONS' chief economist said.

news_headlines.title: Cathie Wood Signals Big Bet on SpaceX Ahead of June IPO. Here’s Why - TipRanks
news_headlines.description: Cathie Wood, founder of ARK Invest, stayed unusually quiet in her daily trading activity on April 21. While her ETFs saw no major buying or selling activity that day, ARK

news_headlines.title: Inside the AI startup Elon Musk is betting $60 billion on - Business Insider
news_headlines.description: The 4-year-old startup just propelled SpaceX in the AI coding race.

news_headlines.title: Amazon.com Launches Program for GLP-1 Weight-Loss Drugs With One Medical - WSJ
news_headlines.description: Members can get Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy and Eli Lilly’s Foundayo GLP-1 pills starting at $25 a month with insurance, or $149 a month for cash-pay options

news_headlines.title: Trump media company replaces CEO, ex-congressman Nunes after stock plunge that wiped out billions - AP News
news_headlines.description: The Trump business behind Truth Social is replacing a former congressman and big supporter of the U.S. president as leader of the social media platform after a stock collapse in the past year. Devin Nunes, a former California congressmen in Donald Trump’s fir…

news_headlines.title: Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models - TechCrunch
news_headlines.description: Meta says that it has a new internal tool that is converting mouse movements and button clicks into data that can train its AI models.

news_headlines.title: Nexstar CEO Perry Sook Rips DirecTV For Its Opposition Of Tegna Deal - Deadline
news_headlines.description: In his first public comments since a federal judge blocked Nexstar's merger with Tegna, Nexstar CEO Perry Sook ripped DirecTV, a merger opponent..

news_headlines.title: New York sues Coinbase and Gemini, seeking to halt unlicensed prediction market businesses - AP News
news_headlines.description: New York is suing Coinbase and Gemini over unregulated and unlicensed prediction market platforms that the state contends are illegal gambling operations. Attorney General Letitia James’ lawsuit was filed Tuesday in state court in Manhattan. James is seeking …

news_headlines.title: World's Largest Condom Maker Says Iran War Is a Problem - Newser
news_headlines.description: Malaysia's Karex says prices may need to rise at least 20%

news_headlines.title: Stock Market Today: SPY, QQQ Reverse Gains as Iran Calls Off Peace Talks; Trump Extends Ceasefire Deadline - TipRanks
news_headlines.description: After opening in positive territory, both the S&P 500 ETF ($SPY) and the Nasdaq 100 ETF ($QQQ) closed lower on Tuesday after Iran announced it would not participate in a second

nyt_headlines.title: Investors Fret Over Tesla’s $25 Billion A.I. Bet
nyt_headlines.abstract: Elon Musk’s electric vehicle company said that it needs to spend big on artificial intelligence and robots. Wall Street is worried about the bill.

nyt_headlines.title: Why Diesel Has Become a Much Bigger Economic Problem Than Gasoline
nyt_headlines.abstract: The war in Iran has disrupted supplies of diesel, used to power trucks and heavy equipment, much more than gasoline, which is primarily used in passenger cars.

nyt_headlines.title: As U.S. Brands Stumble, China Wins Over Young Indonesians
nyt_headlines.abstract: A new generation of Indonesian consumers view Chinese brands as high-tech and of good quality, a departure from the days when “made in China” was associated with cheap goods.

nyt_headlines.title: Explaining the Michael Jackson Biopic’s Rough Path to the Screen
nyt_headlines.abstract: Reshoots, reluctant studios and family holdouts: the production faced many issues. But now the box office is expected to be huge.

nyt_headlines.title: Some Labubu Dolls Contain Cotton Banned By Forced Labor Law, Testing Shows
nyt_headlines.abstract: A test verified by The New York Times found that clothes for some of the viral dolls contained cotton from the Xinjiang region of China, which is banned in the United States.

nyt_headlines.title: Oil Prices Climb as Cease-Fire Uncertainty Deepens
nyt_headlines.abstract: Investors wrestled with uncertainty about the cease-fire between the United States and Iran.

nyt_headlines.title: Lululemon Names Former Nike Executive as Its Next C.E.O.
nyt_headlines.abstract: Heidi O’Neill will join the maker of yoga pants and other athletic clothing in September.

nyt_headlines.title: Tesla Profit Rises but Remains Below Earlier Highs
nyt_headlines.abstract: The company is investing in robots and self-driving taxis that are not yet generating significant sales.

nyt_headlines.title: Iran Again Tightens Its Grip on Shipping in the Strait of Hormuz
nyt_headlines.abstract: Traffic in the strait has all but halted as Iran renews its attacks, striking two vessels on Wednesday. More than 300 ships linked to Iran have passed through the strait since the war began.

nyt_headlines.title: Fed Pick Faces Skepticism Over Claim of Independence From Trump
nyt_headlines.abstract: Kevin Warsh’s nomination to lead the Federal Reserve could still be delayed by a Justice Department investigation into the current chair, Jerome H. Powell.

nyt_headlines.title: Trump’s Pick to Lead Fed Will Face Senators at a Tricky Moment
nyt_headlines.abstract: Kevin M. Warsh has enough support to become the next chair of the Federal Reserve, but a criminal investigation into the central bank stands in his way.

nyt_headlines.title: Here’s One Way to Know if Kevin Warsh Is Up to the Job
nyt_headlines.abstract: The question of the central bank’s independence looms over the economy.

nyt_headlines.title: Trump’s Fed Pick Faces Tough Task Shedding ‘Sock Puppet’ Label
nyt_headlines.abstract: Kevin M. Warsh, at his confirmation hearing to lead the Federal Reserve, sought to dispel concerns that he would cut interest rates to please President Trump.

nyt_headlines.title: A criminal inquiry into the Fed looms large over the Warsh hearing.
